name: Sharma Bricks Industries
description: Established in 1998, Sharma Bricks Industries is one of the leading brick manufacturers in the region. We specialize in high-quality red bricks, fly ash bricks, and hollow blocks suitable for all types of construction projects.

products.name: Red Clay Bricks
products.description: Traditional red clay bricks, kiln fired, excellent strength and durability for load bearing walls.

products.name: Fly Ash Bricks
products.description: Eco-friendly fly ash bricks with superior strength and thermal insulation properties.

products.name: Hollow Concrete Blocks
products.description: Lightweight hollow blocks for partition walls and non-load bearing applications.

name: Patel Brick Works
description: Patel Brick Works has been supplying quality bricks since 1985. Our automated manufacturing process ensures consistent quality and timely delivery for all construction requirements.

products.name: Wire Cut Bricks
products.description: Machine made wire cut bricks with uniform size and high compressive strength.

products.name: AAC Blocks
products.description: Autoclaved Aerated Concrete blocks for modern construction with excellent insulation.

name: Modi Construction Bricks
description: Modi Construction Bricks offers a range of traditional and modern brick solutions for residential, commercial and industrial construction projects across India.

products.name: First Class Bricks
products.description: Premium first class bricks with smooth finish, ideal for exposed brickwork and architectural features.

name: ClearView Glass Solutions
description: ClearView Glass Solutions is a premium supplier of architectural glass for residential and commercial projects. We offer custom cutting, tempering, laminating and installation services.

products.name: Tempered Safety Glass
products.description: Heat-treated tempered glass with 4-5x strength of normal glass. Perfect for shower enclosures, doors and facades.

products.name: Double Glazed Insulated Glass
products.description: Double pane glass units with argon gas fill for superior thermal and acoustic insulation.

products.name: Mirror Glass
products.description: High quality silver mirrors with waterproof backing for bathrooms and decorative applications.

name: Singh Glass & Aluminium
description: Singh Glass & Aluminium provides complete glazing solutions including glass supply, aluminium frames, sliding windows, and partition systems for all building types.

products.name: Float Glass
products.description: Standard float glass for windows, mirrors and general glazing applications.

products.name: Tinted Glass
products.description: Bronze, grey and blue tinted glass for solar control and aesthetic appeal.

name: UltraTech Cement Dealer
description: Authorized dealer for UltraTech and ACC cement brands. We supply PPC, OPC and specialty cements for all construction needs with same-day delivery in the city.

products.name: PPC Cement 50kg
products.description: Portland Pozzolana Cement for general construction, slabs and masonry work.

products.name: OPC 53 Grade Cement
products.description: Ordinary Portland Cement 53 grade for RCC, pre-stressed concrete and high strength applications.

name: Tata Steel Distributor
description: Authorized distributor of Tata Steel TMT bars and structural steel. We supply Fe-500D TMT bars, angles, channels and MS plates for construction and fabrication.

products.name: TMT Bars Fe-500D
products.description: High strength earthquake resistant TMT bars for RCC construction.

products.name: MS Angles & Channels
products.description: Mild steel angles and channels for structural fabrication and support structures.

name: Johnson Tiles Showroom
description: Exclusive Johnson Tiles showroom with 500+ designs in floor tiles, wall tiles, vitrified and digital tiles. Custom tile solutions for premium residential and commercial projects.

products.name: Vitrified Floor Tiles 60x60
products.description: Double charged vitrified tiles with high gloss finish, scratch resistant and easy to maintain.

products.name: Digital Wall Tiles
products.description: High definition digital printed wall tiles with realistic stone and marble patterns.

products.name: Outdoor Anti-Skid Tiles
products.description: Heavy duty anti-skid tiles for outdoor areas, parking lots and wet zones.

name: Asian Paints Pro
description: Premium Asian Paints dealer offering complete painting solutions. We provide full range from primers to topcoats, texture finishes, waterproofing solutions and professional application services.

products.name: Apex Exterior Emulsion
products.description: Premium exterior wall paint with weather shield technology for long lasting protection.

products.name: Royale Interior Emulsion
products.description: Luxury interior paint with smooth, silk finish and washable surface.

name: Supreme Pipes & Fittings
description: Complete plumbing solutions including CPVC, UPVC and HDPE pipes, fittings, valves and sanitary ware. We supply to plumbers, contractors and direct customers.

products.name: CPVC Hot & Cold Water Pipes
products.description: Chlorinated PVC pipes for hot and cold water plumbing with superior pressure rating.

products.name: UPVC Drainage Pipes
products.description: UV resistant UPVC pipes for drainage, sewage and underground applications.

name: Havells Electricals Hub
description: Authorized Havells distributor for wires, cables, switches, MCBs and distribution boards. We serve builders, electrical contractors and individuals for all project types.

products.name: Havells FR Cables 2.5 sq mm
products.description: Flame retardant PVC insulated multi-strand copper conductor cables for house wiring.

products.name: Havells Modular Switches
products.description: Premium modular switches with smooth operation and elegant design for modern homes.

name: Balaji Timber Mart
description: Premium timber and wood supplier for furniture, flooring, and construction. We stock teak, sagwan, pine, and engineered wood products from sustainable sources.

products.name: Teak Wood (Sagwan) Planks
products.description: Seasoned teak wood planks for furniture, doors and window frames. Superior durability.

products.name: Marine Plywood 18mm
products.description: Boiling water proof marine plywood for kitchen cabinets, bathrooms and high moisture areas.
